title: Grand Oak Gas Log Set | Heat & Glo
description: Grand Oak gas log set: a substantial six-log oak arrangement engineered for larger traditional fireplace openings. Layered flame, realistic bark detail, vented operation.

hero.eyebrow: GRAND OAK — VENTED GAS LOG SET
hero.h1: A substantial gas log set built for substantial openings.
hero.lede: The Grand Oak fills a larger traditional fireplace opening with a six-log oak arrangement, deeper ember bed, and a layered flame pattern that reads convincingly as a real wood fire from across the room.
